records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of at least 5 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars >= 5
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where rating.stars >= 5 limit 5
records.thought: Select reviewers who have given a rating of 5 or more stars by joining Reviewer and Rating tables and filtering on stars.

records.question: Who are the reviewers named Mike Anderson with ratings of at least 3 stars given on or before 2011-01-09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' AND reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND rating.stars >= 3
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%mike anderson%' and rating.stars >= 3 and rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter reviewers named Mike Anderson and join with ratings having at least 3 stars and rating date on or before 2011-01-09, then select their rID.

records.question: Which reviewers have rated movies directed by James Cameron released in 2009 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.year >= 2009 AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(movie.director) like '%james cameron%' and movie.year >= 2009 limit 5;
records.thought: To find reviewers who rated movies directed by James Cameron released in 2009 or later, join Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables filtering by director and year.

records.question: Which reviewers named Elizabeth Thomas rated the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron on 2011-01-15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.title = 'Avatar' AND reviewer.name = 'Elizabeth Thomas' AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-15' AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%elizabeth thomas%' and lower(movie.title) like '%avatar%' and lower(movie.director) like '%james cameron%' and rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-15' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers named Elizabeth Thomas who rated the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron on 2011-01-15, so we join Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables with appropriate filters.

records.question: Which reviewers have the name Chris Jackson?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
WHERE reviewer.name = 'Chris Jackson'
records.pred_sql: select rID from Reviewer where lower(name) like '%chris jackson%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find reviewers named Chris Jackson, filter the Reviewer table by name using a case-insensitive match and select their rID with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which reviewers named Ashley White gave at least 3 stars on or before 2011-01-02 to the movie E.T., directed by Steven Spielberg, released in 1982 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-02' AND rating.stars >= 3 AND movie.year <= 1982 AND movie.director = 'Steven Spielberg' AND movie.title = 'E.T.' AND reviewer.name = 'Ashley White'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%ashley white%' and lower(movie.title) like '%e.t.%' and lower(movie.director) like '%steven spielberg%' and movie.year <= 1982 and rating.stars >= 3 and rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-02' limit 5
records.thought: Filter reviewers named Ashley White who rated the movie E.T. directed by Steven Spielberg released in 1982 or earlier with at least 3 stars on or before 2011-01-02, then select their rID.
